name: Ok Members First
description_short: OK Members First Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union chartered in 1951, serving the East Central Oklahoma community with competitive savings, loans, and financial services.
description_long:
OK Members First Federal Credit Union was originally chartered in 1951 as a Safeway Credit Union before transitioning to a community charter in 1998 to serve the East Central High School District in Tulsa, Oklahoma. In 2001, the credit union expanded its field of membership to encompass a broader geographic area in East Tulsa, bounded by 61st and Mingo Road to the south, downtown Tulsa to the west, 66th Street to the north, and 193rd E. Ave to the east. The institution operates under the cooperative movement principle that access to low-cost financial services is essential for the financial health and stability of ordinary citizens.

OK Members First offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services typical of credit unions, including savings accounts, share certificates, home equity loans, IRAs, and general loan products. The credit union emphasizes competitive rates and fee structures as core benefits of membership. Members can access online banking, apply for loans, make payments, and review current loan and deposit rates through their website. The institution maintains a physical branch at 4926 La Cuenta Drive, San Diego, CA 92124, and can be reached during business hours (M-F 8:00am - 3:30pm) by phone or email.

What distinguishes OK Members First is its commitment to the democratic, member-owned structure inherent to credit unions. The board of directors is elected exclusively by members, with each member receiving one equal vote regardless of deposit amount. Directors serve without compensation, and no outside stockholders exist. After reserves are set aside, earnings are returned directly to members through higher dividend rates on savings, lower loan rates, and reduced service costs. As a federally chartered credit union, OK Members First is regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) and deposits are insured by the National Credit Union Share Insurance Fund (NCUSIF).

OK Members First represents a legitimate financial cooperative with over 70 years of operational history. However, membership eligibility is geographically restricted to their defined service area in the East Tulsa community, which may exclude potential customers outside these boundaries. The institution does not appear to offer specialized products like credit cards, business loans, or mortgage lending based on available website information. Like most community-focused credit unions, their service hours and technology platforms may be more limited compared to large national banks.
pros: Federally chartered and NCUA-insured, providing full deposit insurance protection for members
Democratic member ownership structure with one-vote-per-member governance and no outside stockholders
Earnings returned to members as higher savings dividends, lower loan rates, and reduced fees
Over 70 years of operational history and community presence since 1951
Competitive financial products including savings accounts, share certificates, home equity loans, and IRAs
Online banking platform for account access and loan applications
Board directors are uncompensated members, ensuring alignment with member interests
Transparent mission focused on promoting thrift, cooperation, and competitive financial services
cons: Membership is geographically restricted to East Central High School District and defined Tulsa area boundaries, excluding many potential customers
Limited business hours (M-F 8:00am - 3:30pm) with no weekend or extended service availability listed
No evidence of credit card products, mortgage lending, or small business loan programs on website
Single physical branch location in San Diego, CA limits in-person service access
Website content does not detail specific APR ranges, fee structures, or minimum balance requirements for products
best_for: Residents within the defined East Tulsa service area seeking member-owned financial institution benefits
Consumers prioritizing lower fees and loan rates through cooperative credit union structure
Members interested in democratically governed financial institutions with transparent, member-focused operations
Savers and borrowers seeking community-based alternative to large for-profit banks
diagnosis: OK Members First Federal Credit Union is best suited for residents within its defined East Central Oklahoma service area who value member-owned, cooperative financial institutions and seek lower fees and loan rates than traditional banks. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership eligibility restrictions; individuals outside the Tulsa service boundaries cannot join regardless of their interest in the credit union's offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Ok Members First — NCUA-insured credit union in TULSA, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
